title: Coinbase Adds Solana to Crypto-Backed Loans Offering
message_html: Coinbase Adds Solana to Crypto-Backed Loans Offering ...
snippet: Coinbase has added Solana (SOL) to its crypto-backed loans offering. “Holding SOL? SOL-backed loans are now available on Coinbase,” the company said in a Tuesday (May 12) post on X. “Instantly borrow up to $100K in USDC against your Solana without selling.” According to a Coinbase webpage about its
